response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in geospatial data platforms and low-latency, high-performance distributed systems. However, his recent technical stack heavily leans toward TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking the modern C++ or Rust experience explicitly required for this role. His strong domain knowledge in GIS makes him a potential candidate only if the team is willing to allow time for a language ramp-up.
strengths: Strong domain expertise in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (Founder of GISCollective).
Proven experience building low-latency, high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Solid background in testing, CI/CD, and building automated systems to ensure data integrity.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with Modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary required languages.
Most recent roles focus heavily on full-stack web development rather than core backend data pipelines.
No direct experience mentioned with specific navigation routing engines or turn-by-turn guidance algorithms.
